hotel_name: Apec Mandala Mũi Né - Căn hộ khách sạn nghỉ dưỡng (Apec Mandala Mui Ne - Resort Hotel Apartment)

reviews.title: Don’t bother
reviews.text: Absolutely diabolical excuse for a hotel. Arrived to an empty reception only to be approached 4 separate times by people wanting to take a picture of our booking but then not telling us anything. When we asked a member of staff what we were waiting for he informed us our booking didn’t exist but nobody was going to tell us this?! We were told we needed to cancel our original booking and rebook through a ‘different’ hotel even though they are all on the same complex. I rebooked our room and had to pay extra compared to my original booking, when I asked if our original price would be honoured we were told that no it wouldn’t because there would be ‘extras’ included. I’m not sure what extras because we didn’t even have access to the pool! An hour and 15 after arriving at the hotel we were finally shown to our room which was nice enough but the wall paper was falling off and the sheets were dirty. The hotel is also in the middle of nowhere, don’t bother there are plenty of much nicer places in Mui Ne.

reviews.title: Bad service
reviews.text: The service was very bad, the facility is not the same with on ads

reviews.title: Bad service
reviews.text: Bad service, furniture are not quality

reviews.title: Very annoying
reviews.text: This is a serviced apartment, privately rented out, not a hotel. At first, I thought it was a regular resort, but upon arrival, I was confused and had to ask around to find out about the parking and accommodation. I then had to search for the owner's phone number to guide me to the room, making nearly ten calls without any response, which was very confusing during check-in. The room lacked basic items like a toothbrush, towels, and breakfast was a buffet. Swimming was also not allowed because the apartment is not registered.

reviews.title: Good experience for 1 Day stay

reviews.title: 2-day 1-night holiday at Apec Mandala
reviews.text:
First of all, this is a Condotel, so each room will have different interior arrangements, views, or cleanliness levels. This review is based on the apartment I stayed in.  
I stayed in Block M, room 2023.  
1. Cleanliness: 3 stars, many spots like the handwashing faucet are not clean.  
2. Amenities: The air conditioning is weak; you need to know the trick to turn it on. There's no dressing table. There are no towels; upon checking in, I found one towel on the toilet (not sure if it’s a bath towel or a foot mat) + 2 sets of bathcloths. There’s an induction cooker, but no plates or spoons - not sure what the induction cooker is for. The mattress is okay, not very comfortable. There is hot water, which heats up quite quickly.  
3. Location: I booked a sea view room at a higher price of 150k, but the view is not nice; you can only see the sea from one corner, the rest is a vacant lot beside it that is under construction. The location does not catch the wind direction either. So, those staying here might want to book the park view room at a better price; the view might actually be nicer.  
4. Accompanying conveniences: When I booked the room on Agoda, it stated there was a swimming pool, but upon arrival, I was told to buy a swimming package for 130k. I asked if all pools charge a fee, and the staff didn't know. They said it had to be purchased, but in reality, there are both free and paid pools; you can go to the outermost pool, which is free. Regarding the car parking, it’s quite tiring every time you take the car in and out because the parking space is small, not suitable for the hotel's scale, and the parking is far from the accommodation + the slope is quite exhausting + the building is on a hill, going through many winding slopes - be careful if you are a weak driver. Here, the room does not include meals. I went to Mui Ne for dining and entertainment about 20km from the apartment. There aren't many check-in corners in this apartment.  
In conclusion, I rate it 3/5. However, I do not recommend you to come here for a vacation.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Everything matched the pictures on Agoda but it is a big hotel/apartment complex up in the hill, in the middle of nowhere. There are some shops downstairs but more expensive than in the city, same goes for restaurants. Overall, I would not stay there again even though the price is quite low.

reviews.title: 3n2d at Apec Mandala Mui Ne apartment
reviews.text:
My family's 3-day, 2-night experience at the Apec Mandala Mui Ne apartment room
87m2
Pros:
- Beautiful location on the coastal road
- Close to resorts with many delicious restaurants and affordable seafood (recommend Ku So restaurant about 1km from the resort)
- Since it is newly built, the room and furnishings are still new and quite complete
- Many pools, beautiful views, clean, pool water is regularly cleaned by staff and has no chlorine smell (there’s a pool bar right by the pool that is quite chill)
- Hotel staff are friendly and enthusiastic.

Cons:
- No customer support: since my family was in the apartment, we had to call the manager for assistance and then wait for the manager to call the check-in staff for support (the call always goes to voicemail)
- The apartment's pool was dirty upon check-in due to many insect remains floating in (could not get support for pool filtration because of the voicemail, called the manager who said they would send someone to help, but nothing happened until the day we left)
- The room was still under renovation, so there was a lot of dust

I think the service from the hotel would be better than from the apartment. I will consider this when returning.

reviews.title: Nhận phòng
reviews.text: Giá cả hợp lí. Tuy nhiên dịch vụ nhận phòng rất mất thời gian. Gọi số hotline hơn 10 cuộc chuông vẫn đổ nhưng ko ai bắt máy. Không có sự hướng dẫn khách từ trước.

reviews.title: Good resort, service and customer care need improvement.
reviews.text:
A resort with convenient amenities and plenty of entertainment activities for families. The beach in front is accessible by crossing the road, and it is quite empty, mainly frequented by people from Apec. During this trip, I found there were a lot of group guests and companies holding conferences, so the accommodation area was quite crowded. From what I observed, the basic layout of the rooms is quite similar, with the only difference being the view depending on the building. My room had a basic interior mostly facing the internal area. 

I am not satisfied with the service provided by the accommodation unit. The staff's attitude was not warm, cheerful, or friendly towards guests. When I went down to the pool, I had to wait 30 minutes and called multiple times to the reception desk to get access cards for my family to swim. The resort has a rule that each unit operating rental rooms must register and pay a separate fee to use the utility services if they wish to use them. However, when I booked the room, the operator should have automatically registered the pool utility service for me because it was included in the accommodation fee I had paid. It is the responsibility of the room provider. 

I stayed for 4 days and 3 nights, and on the second day, I didn’t see anyone come to clean the room until the afternoon, when I had to call them to request it. They only changed the towels while the floor and bed sheets still had sand. On the third day, some staff came to clean and did a relatively good job. 

My family and I have visited Apec many times and were always satisfied, but this time, booking with a new provider has significantly reduced the quality of our experience.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room for 4 People - Non-Smoking

reviews.title: Cost performance.Quietness.Local restaurant near the sea very cheap.
reviews.text: Located at the northernmost part of Muine Beach, it is somewhat far from the city but quiet and cozy, making it great for relaxation. There are many amenities, and especially, the rooftop pool is very nice.

reviews.title: Strangest place I've ever stayed
reviews.text: A very odd resort. It's miles away from ANYTHING, you won't be able to reach anything on foot (beach isn't great), even grab is a long drive into town. Seems the restaurants here closed down a while ago, replaced with little stalls selling instant noodles and chips, and some very basic overpriced eateries. That said, room was fantastic, very clean and high quality, friendly staff and it has a few nice pools (including rooftop ones). I was happy to pay £7 a night, but if stayed more than 2 nights I would have gone stir crazy with nowhere to go.

reviews.title: Good place for relax and beach view
reviews.text: Don't have too many restaurant around, but can buy seafood in front of hotel with fresh from local people.  However,  beach in front of hotel is not really clean for bathing.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The room is beautiful and clean. The staff is cheerful and enthusiastic. The water is strong and the hot water machine is okay. The amenities are quite good. The view is beautiful, there is a private beach, and there are electric vehicles and escalators, making it very convenient to move to the beach. One meal is free each day, and the food is delicious. Suitable for families on vacation. The downside is that it is quite far from the city, and there is nothing to do around; renting a car to go to the city is possible, but you have to return early because the roads are quite dark and deserted. On the day I visited, there was a power outage from noon until evening, so this issue needs to be improved. The elevator is okay, but it is a bit warm.

reviews.text: There are many losses from just sleeping and coming back. There are no shortages of things to do, such as photo shoots, having a cocktail at the pool bar, and outdoor movie theaters and pools for the kids, but if I had to pinpoint one thing, it would be that meal costs and supermarket prices are double what they are in regular stores (once you enter the complex, it's inconvenient to go out), which is a flaw. Since the rooms are equipped with kitchen facilities, the choice is up to the individual. The success of sunrise photos depends on the weather.

reviews.title: Paradise within a paradise in Mui Ne
reviews.text: Situated in the beachside of Mui Ne, Apec Mandala looks like a 5-star hotel. The place is huge, with plenty of restaurants and convenience stores inside the compound. There are numerous infinity pools facing the beautiful beach of the city. You can go out of the hotel through a golf cart which will take you to the lower lobby. The staff are accommodating and are willing to recommend tours and restaurants nearby, and can book the transportation for you. Over all, I had a great experience during my stay and would love to return here when I visit Mui Ne again.

You can park along the road, around the hotel, or along the road in front of the hotel, then take the escalator or electric vehicle up. I think it's okay. There is a mini mart and shop house, so it's convenient for snacks and meals.

reviews.title: Very satisfied
reviews.text:
I saw some reviews on TikTok and a few other apps that were a bit questionable. But after experiencing 3 days and 2 nights here, I have to say that my whole family was very satisfied; we had a wonderful trip. 
- The beach and hotel view are outstanding.
- There are many swimming pools, and my favorite is the infinity pool.
- The staff is adorable.
- The host is very enthusiastic.
- The rental price is also reasonable; I personally find it cheaper compared to other apps.
- The only downside is that it's a bit far from the center, so if the family has a car, it's more convenient for going out or dining.
- At the beach, there are places selling seafood at low prices, but their cooking is terrible. About 3km away, there's a seafood restaurant called something like "ku sò," which is just okay. The seafood is more expensive than at the beach but offers more variety and is slightly tastier. If you want delicious food, you should go to La Gi or the city.
If I have the chance to go to Phan Thiet, I will come back and recommend this place to my friends.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room for 4 People - Non-Smoking

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Die Hotelzimmer sind schön und sauber. Wir waren 3 Nächte dort. Die Kosten von 1.000.000 dong (33€) für alle 3 Nächte zu zweit waren gut. Der Infinitypool und der Pool ganz vorne sind kostenlos, der Pool in der Mitte hätte extra gekostet. Für ein 5 Sterne Hotel hätte ich aber mehr erwartet. Es gab keinen room Service. Unsere Handtücher mussten wir alle 3 Nächte benutzen ohne, dass diese gewechselt wurden. Auch die Betten wurden nicht gemacht. Das Essensangebot ist miserabel. Es gibt nur Fertigprodukte in den "Restaurants" in der Hotelanlage und diese sind mit 300.000 dong für einen Teller fleisch und eine Schüssel Reis viel zu viel. Wir haben einen Roller für 100.000 dong pro Tag gemietet und sind richtung mui ne gefahren um dort zu essen und Sachen anzuschauen.

reviews.title: Schöne Hotelanlage mit schlechtem Personal und Essensmöglichkeiten.
reviews.text: Eignet sich für eine Nacht um die Dünen anzuschauen mehr aber auch nicht. Bis auf den Golf Buggy fahrer war das Personal weder hilfsbereit noch freundlich.

reviews.title: Bettenburg und Minicity
reviews.text:
Sehr modern und es gibt alles an einem Ort. 
Doof ist es gibt extrem wenige (10-15) Liegen an den Pools für keine Ahnung fast 1000 Zimmer…. Auch keine Handtücher für den Pool. 
Englisch spricht auch kaum jemand, dafür Russisch. 
Viele Familien was gut passt.

reviews.title: リーズナブル
reviews.text: お値段どおりのサービス！いい意味でも、悪い意味でも！！
reviews.room_type: Family, King or Twin, Pool View

reviews.title: ที่พักดีแนะนำ
reviews.text: ที่พักดี โอเคมากค่ะ สะอาด สะดวกสะบาย วิวดีมาก หรูมาก ในราคาไม่แพง

reviews.title: 完全就是骗人，谁用谁撒比
reviews.text: 这里根本就是挂着羊头卖狗肉，连投诉的地方都没。去住的房间跟定的房间相差甚远，退也不能退。住一晚剩下的就扔了
reviews.room_type: Family, King or Twin, Pool View

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: 房间很大，三个游泳池非常好看，高性价比的选择。但是服务人员不太懂英语，沟通起来很困难，需要用翻译器，耽误了不少时间。同时离市中心较远，来回打车也不便宜。房间床单上发现了好几只蚂蚁。

reviews.title: 진짜 호텔중에 최악
reviews.text: 이곳은 내국인 전용단체 수련장?같은곳이지 절대 외국인이 갈 호텔이 아닙니다. 영어소통 안되고 주차관리 외부인 통및 관리 전혀 안되고 그냥 난장판 그자체입니다. 체크인카운터도 없고 다들 자기 일이 아니라고 떠넘기기 바쁘고 진짜 엉망입니다. 도저히 숙박이 불가한 상태라 그냥 돈날리고 숙박안하고 집에 왔어요. 이런 곳이 호텔이라고?? 어이없네요.

reviews.title: 다시는 가고 싶지 않은 숙소
reviews.text:
베트남에 25년째 살면서 Agoda및 에어비엔비 수없이 예약하고 가 봤지만, 이 숙소는 최악이었습니다. 그 이유는

1. 아고다 숙소 소개에는 기본 주방용품이 있다고 나왔지만, 이 숙소 주인(호텔이 아닌 에어비엔비와 같이 개인이 운영)은 주방에 아무것도 준비해 주지 않았슴. 베트낭어로 왜 없냐고 했더니 장기 투숙객만 준다고 함.  잘로로 컴플레인 했더니, 바닥이 다 탄 냄비 두개 갔다줌. 
2. 객실 가운에서 쉰 냄새 진동함.  결국 가운은 체류 하는 동안 베란다에 내어 놓음
3. 숙박 마지막날 오전에 짐싸고 있는데 갑자기 정전. 이유를 물어보니, 아파트에서 전기 공사 중이라서 그렇다고 함.  계속 컴블레인 하자, 그제서야 다시 전기 들어옴
4. 숙소 주위 아무것도 없슴, 이 부분은 미리 인지하고 예약했지만, 이 아파트 아래 있는 식당 등은 폭리를 취함
5. 리셉션 직워늘 태도는, 무조건 집 주인한테 물어보라. 이거임.

이 숙소 주인은 아고다 또는 에어비앤비를 운영할 자격이 없는 사람임. 

그래도 예약하고 싶다면, 한번 체험해 보시고, 후기 남겨주시기 바랍니다. 저는 강력히 비추합니다. 돈 아깝습니다.
reviews.room_type: Suite with Private Pool and Terrace for 4 People

reviews.title: 없다 진짜 없다
reviews.text:
예약후 체크인 문의했는데 직원이 상주하고 있다하여 4시쯤 갔음.
거의 도착후 다시 연락 하고 안내한곳에서 50분 대기후 직원 만날수 있었다.
첫번째 빡침
아침 식사쿠폰은 분명 10만동 이라 했는데 25만동 이란다. 헐 뭐지 했지만 그래도 구매했다.
오션뷰 전망은 좋았다.
두번째 빡침
하지만 풀장의 상태는 벌레가 둥둥 떠다니고 내몸을 담구고 싶지않은 상태 
세번째 빡침
위치가 어느정도 예상은 했지만 없다 진짜 없다 아무것도 없다.
내가 거기서 할수 있는건 없다.
오직 잠자는거 빼곤 
허접한 식당 한두군데 커피숍 미니마트만 서너곳 나머진 미분양 또는 폐업 상태
고급스파 있다고 알고 찾아 갔는데 영업 안한지 좀 된듯 ㅠ
참고로 무이네 번화가 갈려면 20키로 나가야함 ㅋ 왕복 40키로 이상 택시비가 일박숙소비 ㅋ
싸다고 시설사진에 혹해서 여기오면 안됨
잠만자고 멍때리다가 갈람 오고 절대비추

reviews.title: Thất vọng
reviews.text: Tôi đã có một trải nghiệm ko vui. Khi nhận phòng bộ phận lễ tân bảo phải  chờ đợi người bán đến hướng dẫn và giao phòng, còn họ ko bán họ ko biết. Bãi đõ xe ko đủ chỗ, phải đậu xe lề đường, ko có hướng dẫn bãi xe thứ 2. Tivi thì ko có tín hiệu. Cũng ghi nhận một điều là phòng sạch. Thang máy thì quá tải, phải chờ đợi 30p mới có thang, trong khi thang ko hoạt động hết (6 thang chỉ cho khách sử dụng 4 thang).Một trải nghiệm rất tệ.

reviews.title: Wifi khá yếu, đi bộ thang cuốn xuống biển.
reviews.text: Biển nước khá ấm nhưng rất nhiều rác, bãi biển đẹp tuy nhiên đường xuống khá xa phải đi bộ 15 phút. Giờ cao điểm thang máy đông đúc. Mạng wifi khá yếu không thể làm việc được, sóng 5G Viettel, Mobi rất yếu vào lúc cao điểm bị đứt là bình thường. Do đó ai có ý định du lịch vừa làm việc thì rất khó chịu. Giá cả bình dân, hàng quán shophouse bán giá cứng hơn bên ngoài. Khá nhiều khách nội địa, khách Nga lưu trú. Phòng ốc ổn.

reviews.title: Nghỉ dưỡng
reviews.text: Trước khi đến đã hỏi có thể nhận sớm Ko thì đc báo có thể nhận đc nhưng khi đúng 14h mình tới lại phải ngồi chờ 40phút. Mà bạn nv lại Ko hề thân thiện mà chỉ nói do đông quá. Giá phòng đã bao gồm phí hồ bơi nhưng lại chỉ cho mình bơi tới 8h30 hôm sau mình hỏi Bv thì bạn đó kiểu ủa Ko đi đâu sao mà bơi Hoài vậy? Mình đòi vé bơi thì bạn đó hẹn mình 9h vô làm sẽ mang qua. Mình cũng OK nhưng khi bạn đó mang tới lại khó chịu đòi mình phải ra nhận liền vì còn bận dẫn khách khác ủa tui đợi bạn 40phút đc mà bạn chờ tui chút xíu bạn lại khó chịu. Tui thuê phòng và hưởng dv tui đc hưởng chứ có xin bạn cho tui đâu. Chuyến đi 2 ngày 1 đêm mà khó chịu với bạn Bv từ hôm nhận đến hôm trả

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: В цену аренды не входят бассейны на крыше, в центре комплекса. Рядом никакой инфраструктуры - надо ехать в город за 30 минут. Такси из-за этого дорогое. Номера чистые, но не убирались весь заезд. Лифтов мало для таких больших зданий - 6 штук на корпус, долго ждать. Кафе однотипные по ассортименту и субъективно далеко не лучшие. В отеле очень много гостей, постоянно приезжают/уезжают - толкучка на единственной дороге и парковке постоянная. В следующий раз арендовать буду непосредственно в городе.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Прекрасное место, но очень далеко от муйне.
Смотрите локацию это далеко за городом)
reviews.room_type: Family, King or Twin, Pool View

reviews.title: Отличный кондотель
reviews.text:
Все хорошо, плюсов сильно больше 

Из незначительных минусов грязные окна в номерах и холодные бассейны. Непонятное наполнение абонемента, речь про спортзал и бассейны

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Останавливаюсь уже 2ой год в этом месте. Настоятельно рекомендую . Классный номер, шикарный вид. Цена вкусная за такое. Единственный момент он отдален от центра , но на территории есть и кафе и магазины и кофейни и море через дорогу.
reviews.room_type: Family, King or Twin, Pool View

reviews.title: Verey verey good
reviews.text: For a week's stay and a different and unique experience..
reviews.room_type: Family, King or Twin, Pool View

reviews.title: Allt kostar extra
reviews.text: Superfin och lyxig resort, däremot kostar allting extra. Du behöver betala för att få tillgång till pool, gym osv. Ligger dessutom väldigt off så du måste dessutom hyra moppe. Vi hyrde moppe nedanför hotellet & de försökte även scamma oss flertalet gånger. Så va försiktiga & stå på er där.

reviews.title: Stay
reviews.text: It was a good experience with good and sweet people. The hotel food it’s okay but a little too expensive for the quality
reviews.room_type: Family, King or Twin, Pool View
